name: Emacs Tools
description: Agent tools that control a running Emacs daemon via emacsclient.

emacsclientPath.description: Path or command name for emacsclient (default: emacsclient).

timeoutSeconds.description: Command timeout for each emacsclient call (default: 5).

maxReadChars.description: Max chars returned by emacs_read text payload (default: 24000).

allowOpenOutsideWorkspace.description: Allow emacs_open paths outside workspaceDir (default: false).

allowedRoots.description: Extra absolute roots allowed for emacs_open when outside workspace.

disableInSandbox.description: Disable tools in sandboxed sessions (default: true).
